name: Longfellow Park Tennis and Pickleball Courts
description: Longfellow Park Tennis and Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Murphysboro, IL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Saluki Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Saluki Courts in Carbondale, IL! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
